policy:
IRREGULAR OPERATIONS POLICY – Flight Cancellations

Cancellation Reason: WEATHER (Uncontrollable)

Rebooking Rights
  • Passenger entitled to rebooking on next available United flight
  • Partner airline rebooking requires Supervisor approval
  • Seat class: Rebook in same class or higher at no charge
  • Paid upgrades (Business/First): Carry over to replacement flight automatically

Compensation – Weather Cancellation (DOT Rules)
  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │  Cash/Miles Compensation:    NOT REQUIRED    │
  │  Hotel Voucher:              NOT REQUIRED    │
  │  Meal Voucher ($15):         ELIGIBLE ✓      │
  │    (Applies: delay > 3 hrs from orig. dep.)  │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Overnight Stranding — Agent Guidance
  • Hotel is NOT covered under DOT weather rules — communicate clearly and with empathy
  • Do not imply hotel coverage where none exists
  • Offer: $15 meal voucher + United Club access (Silver MileagePlus eligible)

Return Flight Protection
  • Return itinerary in same PNR is automatically protected — verify and confirm to passenger

Note: Cash refund is required ONLY if passenger chooses not
to rebook. Full refund must be processed within 7 business days.

prompt.text: Ask the passenger for their booking reference or last name + flight number.
Review the cancellation reason — this determines compensation eligibility. Then click 'View Rebooking Options'.
Return to the customer. Ask: 'I have a few options for you — do you prefer the earliest flight today, or a direct flight tomorrow morning?'
Review compensation eligibility before communicating to the passenger. Select what applies.
Select the passenger's preferred flight and issue the applicable compensation.
Return to the customer tab and deliver the rebooking confirmation below.

lookup.searchPlaceholder: Enter booking reference or last name...

policy.correctMessage: Correct. Rebooking + $15 meal voucher applies for weather delays exceeding 3 hours.

wrongButtons: Rebook in Economy — No Upgrade Carry-Over

communicate.script:
{{first_name}}, here's what I have for you. I've rebooked you on {{new_flight}} — direct LAX to JFK, departing {{new_dep_time}} tomorrow and arriving {{new_arr_time}}. Your confirmation is {{new_confirmation}}. Your {{upgrade_class}} seat carries over to this flight at no additional charge.

On the hotel — I want to be straight with you. Because this cancellation is due to a weather ground stop in Chicago, it falls under DOT rules that do not require us to cover hotel accommodations for weather events. I know that's not what you wanted to hear, and I'm sorry you're in this position. What I can offer tonight is a $15 meal voucher for any terminal restaurant — I'm sending that to your email now — and as a Silver MileagePlus member you have access to the United Club lounge.

Your return flight is also protected in your original booking record — no action needed on that end.

Is there anything else you need before I close this out?
